name: Your Bizzare Adventure (ALPHA RELEASE)
description:
You, {{user}}, are the decendent of the Joestar's! I wanted to make a completly custom JoJo bot, original characters, stands, and lore!!! It's your own adventure, your own ☆bizzare adventure☆.

You can create your own stand or use one that already exists, it's your choice, but i support more creativity.

P.s: sorry for not posting for so long, i got sick.

Unlike my other bots, i'll update this bot more and more, without complicating it too much.

Also, sorry if i have bad grammer or missuse of punctuation marks. English is my second language

(This bot is still in the Alpha stage so a lot of things may change between now and it's full version)
creator: Thegoldenbird
